Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
Predefined Jetty Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty
Apache Juneau Petstore - Jetty/Microservice deployment.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot
Apache Juneau Petstore - Spring Boot deployment.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.server.config.rest
Server Configuration REST
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet used by org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
    Class
    Description
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet used by org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
    Class
    Description
    BasicRestResource
    Identical to BasicRestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    BasicRestServletGroup
    Specialized subclass of BasicRestServlet for showing "group" pages.
    RestMixin
    Optional base class for @Rest mixin classes — the third sibling of RestServlet (servlet flavor) and RestResource (child-resource flavor), completing the servlet / resource / mixin naming triad.
    RestResource
    Identical to RestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet used by org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
    Class
    Description
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    BasicRestServletGroup
    Specialized subclass of BasicRestServlet for showing "group" pages.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.

    Specialized subclass of BasicRestServlet for showing "group" pages.

  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
    Class
    Description
    RestMixin
    Optional base class for @Rest mixin classes — the third sibling of RestServlet (servlet flavor) and RestResource (child-resource flavor), completing the servlet / resource / mixin naming triad.
    RestMixin.Builder
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestMixin subclass.
    RestResource
    Identical to RestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.

    Class
    Description
    RestMixin
    Optional base class for @Rest mixin classes — the third sibling of RestServlet (servlet flavor) and RestResource (child-resource flavor), completing the servlet / resource / mixin naming triad.
    RestResource
    Identical to RestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
    Class
    Description
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
    Class
    Description
    BasicRestResource
    Identical to BasicRestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    RestMixin
    Optional base class for @Rest mixin classes — the third sibling of RestServlet (servlet flavor) and RestResource (child-resource flavor), completing the servlet / resource / mixin naming triad.
    RestMixin.Builder
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestMixin subclass.
    RestMixin.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestMixin.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
    RestResource
    Identical to RestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    RestResource.Builder
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestResource subclass.
    RestResource.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestResource.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
    RestServlet.Builder
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestServlet subclass.
    RestServlet.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestServlet.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case, so callers are not forced to spell the SELF type parameter.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
    Class
    Description
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
